sections.paragraph:
Original: כּתּנת כּתנת

Transliteration: kethôneth kûttôneth

Phonetic: keth-o'-neth

BDB Definition:

  1. tunic, under-garment
    1. a long shirt-like garment usually of linen

Origin: from an unused root meaning to cover [compare H3802]

TWOT entry: 1058a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
